name: flow-control
description: Flow control and execution nodes for Cognigy.AI — function calls, flow execution, and flow-shaping utilities

scripts.build: npm run transpile && npm run lint && npm run zip
scripts.zip: tar cfz $npm_package_name-$npm_package_version.tar.gz build/* package.json README.md icon.png

author: Ben Elliot <ben.elliot@nice.com>
